reason_rows.portal_safe_summary: Human verification is required before the portal session can continue.
reason_rows.operator_summary: Anti-bot or auth-challenge screen detected; automation must stop and await human verification.

source_refs.rationale: The shared operating contract requires manual checkpoints to persist durable artifacts, sanitized evidence, and explicit resume rules.
Step-up, CAPTCHA, and human-confirmation actions must fail closed and may not be bypassed by a machine actor.
Resume artifacts must be revalidated against route identity, session validity, and post-step-up continuity before mutation resumes.
Manual checkpoint evidence must stay sanitized and must not persist one-time codes or other sensitive materials.
Checkpoint atlases and resume diagnostics must remain automation-verifiable, keyboard reachable, and stable under reduced motion.
Checkpoint artifacts require durable audit-safe structure instead of being buried in ephemeral telemetry noise.

notes: CAPTCHA and Auth Challenge remain provider-controlled and non-bypassable.

reason_rows.portal_safe_summary: A provider-controlled sign-in factor must be completed before the session can continue.
reason_rows.operator_summary: A one-time code, authenticator prompt, or equivalent MFA gate is active.

source_refs.rationale: The shared operating contract requires manual checkpoints to persist durable artifacts, sanitized evidence, and explicit resume rules.

Checkpoint artifacts require durable audit-safe structure instead of being buried in ephemeral telemetry noise.

notes: MFA completion does not authorize stale pre-step-up mutations to replay.

reason_rows.portal_safe_summary: The portal requires additional identity assurance before this action can continue.
reason_rows.operator_summary: A sensitive step requires stronger identity posture than the pre-checkpoint session currently carries.

reason_rows.operator_summary: Provider requested push approval, device trust confirmation, or hardware-factor acknowledgement.

reason_rows.operator_summary: Suspicious-login or unusual-activity review is active and requires human intervention.
